summary: Batch 5.8 Virtual Classroom Overhaul - All features verified. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components working correctly including GreenRoom, Admin Observer mode, ControlDock, AVSettingsModal, ChatDrawer, mobile layout.
critical_code_review_comments: RoomAudioRenderer correctly placed inside LiveKitRoom wrapper (Zero Audio fix verified)
GreenRoom has camera preview, mic level meter (via Web Audio API), device selection dropdowns
Admin mode selector shows 'Join as Observer' and 'Join as Participant' buttons with correct descriptions
Observer mode: mic/cam disabled, banner shows 'invisible to participants', observer IDs filtered from VideoStrip
ControlDock uses glassmorphism styling with role-based buttons (teacher: QuranNav+Record, student: RaiseHand)
End Class button has proper red styling (bg-red-500)
Mobile layout uses MobileVideoRow (horizontal scroll at top) and icon-only dock buttons
ChatDrawer slides from bottom on mobile (half-screen overlay)

test_credentials.note: Test users created and cleaned up after testing

seed_data_creation: Created test student, teacher, admin users and class session for testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5.8 Virtual Classroom Overhaul verified. Key features: GreenRoom pre-call lobby with device selection, Admin Observer mode (invisible with disabled A/V), Premium dark layout with Mushaf center and video tiles in right sidebar, Centralized ControlDock with glassmorphism, Chat as slide-out drawer, Mobile-first with MobileVideoRow at top, RoomAudioRenderer inside LiveKitRoom for Zero Audio fix.

epic_4_av_core_green_room.green_room_camera_preview: VERIFIED - Shows camera preview area with 'Muted' indicator
epic_4_av_core_green_room.green_room_mic_level_meter: VERIFIED - Uses Web Audio API (AudioContext + AnalyserNode)
epic_4_av_core_green_room.green_room_device_selection: VERIFIED - Camera and Microphone dropdowns in expandable settings
epic_4_av_core_green_room.green_room_join_now_button: VERIFIED - Green button triggers LiveKit token request
epic_4_av_core_green_room.zero_audio_fix: VERIFIED - RoomAudioRenderer rendered inside LiveKitRoom wrapper
epic_4_av_core_green_room.admin_observer_mode: VERIFIED - Modal with Observer/Participant choice, observer is invisible
epic_4_av_core_green_room.av_settings_modal: VERIFIED - Camera, Microphone, Speaker device selection dropdowns

epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.dark_theme: VERIFIED - bg-slate-900 for classroom, glassmorphism effects
epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.quran_maximized_center: VERIFIED - DigitalMushaf fills center with teacher toolbar
epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.video_tiles_right_sidebar: VERIFIED - VideoStrip in 20% width right sidebar (240px)
epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.centralized_control_dock: VERIFIED - Glassmorphism bottom bar with all controls
epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.chat_slide_out_drawer: VERIFIED - Slides from bottom on mobile (half-screen overlay)
epic_2_premium_edtech_layout.mobile_first_adaptation: VERIFIED - MobileVideoRow at top, icon-only dock buttons

control_dock_elements.end_class_button: VERIFIED - data-testid='dock-end-class' with red bg-red-500 styling
control_dock_elements.quran_navigator_teacher_only: VERIFIED - data-testid='dock-quran' shown only for teachers
control_dock_elements.raise_hand_student_only: VERIFIED - data-testid='dock-hand' shown only for students
control_dock_elements.record_button_teacher_only: VERIFIED - data-testid='dock-record' shown only for teachers

observer_mode.observer_banner: VERIFIED - 'Observer Mode — You are invisible to participants'
observer_mode.disabled_av_controls: VERIFIED - Mic/Cam buttons disabled in observer mode
observer_mode.filtered_from_video_tiles: VERIFIED - observerIds filtered from VideoStrip and MobileVideoRow

backend_api_verification.GET /api/classroom/session/{id}: VERIFIED - Returns session data with teacher_name, student_name, meet_link_slug
backend_api_verification.POST /api/classroom/livekit/token: VERIFIED - Returns token, server_url, identity, name, is_teacher
backend_api_verification.POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/go-live: VERIFIED - Teacher can mark session as live
backend_api_verification.GET /api/classroom/next-class: VERIFIED - Returns next upcoming class with is_joinable flag
